state.title: QCViz-MCP v3

Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.
                  
                
              
            U"; DROP TABLE jobs; --

messages.text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

U"; DROP TABLE jobs; --
🚨 unicode chaos
<svg/onload=alert(1)>

DROP looks like an abbreviation, and chemistry abbreviations can be ambiguous.If you want a calculation, tell me the full compound name or a SMILES string.If you want an explanation, tell me which compound you mean and what you want to know.For example: full name + HOMO, full name + ESP, or SMILES + optimize.{
